metadata.title: Street Dance
metadata.lyrics:
[00:16.46] Everywhere that you may go
[00:25.16] Where jammin' in the street
[00:27.52] All the people that you meet
[00:30.18] Dance to the beat
[00:31.86] If you come to New-York City
[00:34.41] You'll never be the wack
[00:36.34] When you see us city kids
[00:38.78] Spinning on our backs
[00:42.16] I like the way he does that dance
[00:50.32] When he glides across the floor
[00:53.33] You know it really blows my mind
[00:55.64] I always yell for me
[00:57.29] I can't believe the things I see
[00:59.41] Like diving on the ground
[01:01.11] Then he's standing on his head
[01:03.37] And groovin' to the sound
[01:05.27] Refrain:
[01:05.96] Now just let your body move
[01:07.83] Street dance, Street dance
[01:09.89] Put your feet into the groove
[01:12.04] Street dance, Street dance
[01:14.01] When you feel your body shake
[01:15.58] Street dance, Street dance
[01:18.11] Then you know you've got to break
[01:20.54] All the people that we know
[01:34.51] Are rockin' on the one
[01:36.48] On the corner of Chi' Town
[01:39.23] They're breakdancing for fun
[01:41.26] At the night clubs in L.A.
[01:43.44] Their master mix is on
[01:45.31] On the side walk of Detroit
[01:47.66] They're poppin' all night long
[01:49.36] Refrain:
[01:49.61] Now just let your body move
[01:51.84] Street dance, Street dance
[01:53.86] Put your feet into the groove
[01:55.96] Street dance, Street dance
[01:58.24] When you feel your body shake
[02:00.71] Street dance, Street dance
[02:02.76] Then you know you've got to break
[02:05.03] Everywhere that you may go
[02:26.88] Where jammin' in the street
[02:29.21] All the people that you meet
[02:31.67] Dance to the beat
[02:33.63] If you come to New-York City
[02:36.68] You'll never be the wack
[02:37.94] When you see us city kids
[02:40.23] Spinning on our backs
[02:41.83]
